research_question: Do the Foundry LB position->C/V headline numbers (single-feat AUC 0.744/p0.035; 7-feat 7-fold CV AUC 0.835/perm-p0.01) reproduce from scratch?
mechanical_verdict: REPRODUCED_EXACTLY + filter-bug found (exp(log(20))<20 drops 3 signs; 74 vs 77)
data_sources_and_corpus_version: silver LA 1341 inscr/52 sites; DAMOS Linear B 13562 wordforms; GORILA 3147 words; packed_load_a 539
source_dependencies: DAMOS LB wordforms; known LB syllabic values as GRADING labels only (non-circular)
effective_n_and_independence_unit: 77 LB signs freq>=20 (74 under explog bug); independence unit = sign
features_channels: 7 positional/entropy features: initial_rate, final_rate, mean_pos, lone_rate, lnbr_ent, rnbr_ent, log_freq
algorithm_model: L2 logistic regression (l2=1.0, 500 iters, lr 0.3); z-score standardize; 7-fold shuffled CV
search_space_and_params: freq threshold 20; folds 7; seed 20260708; single-feat perm n=2000, CV perm n=200
heldout_design: 7-fold CV on LB signs; known LB values grade only
positive_and_negative_controls: label-permutation null (positive control that fit is honest wrt overfit)
null_family_and_run_count: label permutation: single-feature n=2000, CV n=200
primary_metric_and_value: single-feat initial_rate AUC 0.744 (int77) / 0.759 (explog74); 7-feat CV AUC 0.835(74)/0.825(77) perm-p0.01 [VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT A1_recompute.json]
ablations_robustness: log_freq_only AUC ~0.838 >= full model -> AUC is a frequency prior; explog filter bug documented
contamination_leakage: none; LB values used only as labels; flagged Foundry floating-point sign-count discrepancy
strongest_authorized_claim: Foundry LB numbers reproduce exactly; the CV AUC is frequency-dominated (L2, LB-only)
forbidden_stronger_claim: that LB positional structure carries relative phonological info independent of frequency
limitations_blockers: signal confounded with frequency prior; sets up A2-A6 audit
supersession_relations: reproduces Foundry commit 0fafe40/ac73b4e; feeds SUPERSESSION of Foundry C1 (position->C/V)

canonical_name: Multiplicity audit of the position->C/V p-value
research_question: Does position->C/V p~0.035 survive correction for feature-family/threshold/fold/seed/model/analogue and best-of-selection search?
mechanical_verdict: SINGLE-FEATURE POSITION DOWNGRADED — survives no correction; not even the best feature
data_sources_and_corpus_version: silver LA 1341 inscr/52 sites; DAMOS Linear B 13562 wordforms; GORILA 3147 words; packed_load_a 539

algorithm_model: Bonferroni, Holm, BH-FDR; best-of-K permutation search-adjusted null (K=1000 channel, K=200 config)
search_space_and_params: garden-of-forking-paths product: 7 feat x 13 atlas x 5 thresh x 3 folds; illustrative 420 configs
positive_and_negative_controls: log_freq baseline shows position not best
null_family_and_run_count: best-of-K permutation nulls K=1000 (channel), K=200 (config selection)
multiplicity_correction: Bonferroni x7=0.245 / x13=0.455; Holm 0.36; FDR q 0.168; best-of-config search-adj p 0.0299
primary_metric_and_value: position Bonf x13 p=0.455; Holm 0.36; FDR q 0.168; log_freq AUC 0.878>0.744 position [VERIFIED A2_multiplicity.json]
uncertainty: 7-feat CV label-perm p 0.01 survives config search but is a frequency prior (log_freq_only 0.838)
ablations_robustness: position_subfamily x threshold best-of-K p 0.1628 (does NOT survive)
strongest_authorized_claim: position channel does not survive multiplicity; 7-feat CV signal is a frequency prior (L2, LB)
forbidden_stronger_claim: position is a corpus-internal C/V symmetry-breaker
limitations_blockers: value-blindness question shifts to substitution channel (C_AUDIT)
supersession_relations: load-bearing for CV_ANALOGUE_REFUTED; supersedes Foundry C1
